app.name: DIRD
app.longDescription: Ophthalmological image analysis platform with edge-computing AI. All data stays on your device.

comingSoon.analysis: AI analysis will be available soon
comingSoon.reports: Report generation will be available soon

confirmations.deleteImage: Are you sure you want to delete this image and all its associated analyses?
confirmations.deleteSession: Are you sure you want to delete this session and all its data? This action is irreversible.
confirmations.duplicateSession: Are you sure you want to duplicate this session?
confirmations.deletePatient: Are you sure you want to delete this patient and all their data? This action is irreversible.
confirmations.archivePatient: Are you sure you want to {{action}} this patient?

patients.title: Patients
patients.name: Name
patients.description: Manage patients and their analysis sessions
patients.empty: No patients registered. Create one to start.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.empty: No sessions registered. Create one to start the analysis.

form.name: Session Name
form.editDescription: Modify the details of this session.
form.createDescription: Create a new analysis session for this patient

upload.galleryEmpty: No images in this session. Upload some to start the analysis.
upload.dropzone: Drag and drop files here or click to select

tools.title: Tools
tools.bboxInstruction: Click and drag to draw a bounding box

reports.finalWarning: Note: The final report will lock the session and prevent adding or deleting images or analyses.

import.waitMessage: This may take a few moments

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize the application to your needs

source.title: Model Source
source.localDescription: Use locally stored ONNX models. Guarantees complete privacy as all processing happens on your device.
source.apiDescription: Connect to a custom API for inference. Useful for private, paid, or proprietary models hosted on servers.

processing.title: Processing Settings
processing.autoProcessDescription: Automatically run model inference when images are uploaded

pwa.title: Progressive Web App (PWA)
pwa.installDescription: Install DIRD as a standalone app for quick access and offline functionality.

benefits.title: Benefits of Installing
benefits.offline: Works completely offline after first load
benefits.desktop: Quick access from your desktop or home screen
benefits.privacy: Enhanced privacy - all processing is local

about.title: About DIRD
about.description: Ophthalmological image analysis platform with edge-computing AI. All data stays on your device.

install.title: Install DIRD
install.description: Install the app for quick access and offline use
